name: Apple Turnovers 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure flour and salt into a bowl.
2. Cut in margarine and cream cheese with pastry blender until mixture resembles coarse meal.
3. Mix with hands until dough forms a ball. Chill 1 hour.
4. On lightly floured board, roll chilled dough to 12x16 inch rectangle.
5. Cut into twelve 4 inch squares.
6. Combine apples, sugar, cinnamon and nutmeg; mix well.
7. Place 1 rounded teaspoonful of apple mixture in center of each square.
8. Moisten 2 adjacent sides of each square and fold to form triangles.
9. Seal edges with tines of fork.
10. Cut 2 small slits in top of each turnover.
11. Place on ungreased baking sheets.
12. Bake at 400°F about 15 minutes, or until lightly browned.
13. Remove from baking sheets and cool on wire racks.
14. Sprinkle with powdered sugar.
